title: Omnicraft
description: A ben 10 datapack for 1.21.0 that adds the omnitrix and all original series, alien force and ultimate alien's aliens to minecraft
body:
A ben 10 datapack for 1.21.11 that adds the omnitrix and all original series, alien force and ultimate alien's aliens to minecraft

**Make sure to do /reload for the pack to work properly.**

# Useful commands:
  **obtain the omnitrix:** 
```
/function ben:omnitrix/get_omnitrix
```


  **remove the omnitrix:** 
```
/function ben:omnitrix/remove_omnitrix
```


  **obtain master control:** 
```
/function ben:master_control_unlock
```
 (you can also hack the omnitrix as graymatter or brainstorm, or use the unlocking code)

  **remove master control:** 
```
/function ben:master_control_lock
```


# Additional features:
**Misstransforming:** There is a chance that you might transform into the wrong alien. It's not a bug; it's a feature.

**Master Control:** Master Control will provide you with an infinite amount of time as an alien. It will eliminate the cooldown time and mis-transformations. Additionally, it will allow you to quickly change between aliens if you're selecting the 9th slot in the hotbar.

**Filesafe:** If you're in human form and the Omnitrix is not in recharge mode, and you have 4 points of health or less, the failsafe will activate. This will transform you into a random alien and heal you to full health.

**Genetic Repair Function:** If you approach a zombie villager, you can instantly cure them.

**Broken Omnitrix:** Breaking the Omnitrix will activate the randomizer function. To repair the Omnitrix, you need to craft a Genetic Stabilizer, hold it in your hand and right click.

**Change Omnitrix's Appearance:** you can change the Omnitrix's Appearance (crouch and rigth click your 7th slot)

**Change Omnitrix's Color:** you can change the aliens and Omnitrix's Colors (crouch and rigth click your 7th slot)

**Insert Unlocking Code:**  you can insert 4 digit codes to unlock new aliens (crouch and rigth click your 7th slot)

**Going Ultimate:**
by defeating the Techadon robot in the Techadon Factory, you can obtain the Polymorph Crystal. Right-clicking the crystal will upgrade your Omnitrix to an Ultimatrix, allowing you to go ultimate by transforming into an alien with an ultimate form, selecting your 8th slot and right-clicking.
